friday.name: The Shin-Saver Circuit
notes: 4 Rounds: A -> B -> C -> D with No Rest between exercises
Rest 2 mins after completing all 4 exercises, then repeat

exercises.form: 30s ALL OUT sprint, 90s easy spin recovery
exercises.name: VO2 Max Bike Sprints

monday.goal: Build wire-strong muscle density. Low Reps.
monday.name: Density Strength

exercises.form: Test
exercises.name: New Exercise

exercises.form: Only 45-degree knee bend. Squeeze towel between knees
exercises.name: VMO Wall Sits

exercises.form: 15 reps per leg. Wakes up glute medius to stop knee caving
exercises.name: Side-Lying Clamshells

exercises.form: 10 per side. Replaces deep squat hold
exercises.name: Quadruped T-Spine Rotations

exercises.form: Combined exercise for shin strength and elbow rehab
exercises.name: Tibialis Wall Raises & Finger Extensions

exercises.form: 45-degree knee bend, squeeze towel between knees
exercises.name: VMO Wall Sits

exercises.form: 3s up, 4s down, focus on affected leg for Achilles strengthening
exercises.name: Heavy Slow Calf Raises

exercises.form: Side plank with top leg supported, focus on adductor engagement
exercises.name: Short-Lever Copenhagen Planks

exercises.form: Band around knee, extend from 30-degree bend to full extension
exercises.name: Banded TKEs (Terminal Knee Extensions)

exercises.form: Heels on ball, bridge up and curl ball toward glutes
exercises.name: Swiss Ball Hamstring Curls

exercises.form: 60-second hang from pull-up bar for spine decompression
exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Dead Hang

tuesday.name: Waist & Core
notes: No warmup section - exercises go straight into core work

exercises.form: 4 min run / 1 min walk intervals. 170-175 cadence, flat foot strike, ASICS Kayanos
exercises.name: Run/Walk Intervals

exercises.form: Do not jog. Walk aggressively.
exercises.name: Power Walk (Velocity Hike)

exercises.form: 35-40 min run/walk intervals, future 6-mile continuous run. Conversational pace
exercises.name: Long Run Intervals

thursday.name: Endurance
notes: Recovery bike is mandatory - flushes lactic acid

exercises.form: 25-30 min intervals, eventually 4-5 mile tempo run. 170-175 cadence
exercises.name: Run/Walk Intervals - Tempo

wednesday.name: Fat Incinerator
notes: This is the biggest calorie burner of the week

exercises.form: Neutral grip, full range of motion, elbow-safe
exercises.name: Neutral-Grip Lat Pulldowns

exercises.form: Neutral grip, chest supported
exercises.name: DB Rows

exercises.form: 45-degree incline, controlled tempo
exercises.name: Incline DB Bench Press

exercises.form: Neutral grip, full range of motion
exercises.name: Seated DB Shoulder Press

exercises.form: Neutral grip, controlled tempo
exercises.name: DB Hammer Curls

exercises.form: Rope attachment, full extension
exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdowns
